commit.subject: LU-17429 tests: sanity-quota/48 file needs proj=10000
commit.message:
LU-17429 tests: sanity-quota/48 file needs proj=10000

The sanity-quota test_48 file needs to explicitly set project ID
to 10000 as required by the test case, to avoid depending on a
previous test having used this QID.

Allow a delay for the QID to be added/removed from visibility.
Improve code style to allow test file to be created on any OST.
Replace direct /proc file access with "lctl get_param".

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 78be823f33 ("LU-15218 quota: delete unused quota ID")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I3bf5700ee4209dc31fab13554f6ef96614cdb1ea
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59951
Reviewed-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Frederick Dilger <fdilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
